char.name: Jehu
char.bio: Son of Nimshi, anointed by Elisha's man to wipe out the house of Ahab. I drive my chariot like a madman, they know me from far off. Joram, Ahaziah, Jezebel out the window, Ahab's seventy sons, the priests of Baal, all of it, in one sweep. 'Come and see my zeal for the LORD.'
